title: Spicy Vegan Peruvian Stew
description: A hearty, flavorful stew made with Peruvian aji amarillo peppers and served with a side of crunchy raw vegetables.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the diced aji amarillo peppers, onions, bell peppers, and potatoes. Cook for 5-7 minutes, until the vegetables are tender.
Add the diced tomatoes, chopped cilantro, and freshly squeezed lime juice. Stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes, until the stew has thickened slightly.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
